originalTitle: Will This Jensen Huang-Endorsed AI Chip Stock Be the Next Trillion-Dollar Company?
summary: This chipmaker's stock has already more than tripled in 2026 alone, and reaching a trillion-dollar market value would require it to more than quadruple from here.
content: This chipmaker's stock has already more than tripled in 2026 alone, and reaching a trillion-dollar market value would require it to more than quadruple from here.
chineseTitle: 这家黄仁勋认可的 AI 芯片股会成为下一个万亿美元公司吗？
chineseSummary: 仅 2026 年，这家芯片制造商的股价就已经增长了两倍多，要达到万亿美元的市值，则需要在此基础上翻两番以上。
chineseContent: 仅 2026 年，这家芯片制造商的股价就已经增长了两倍多，要达到万亿美元的市值，则需要在此基础上翻两番以上。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
